response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 15+ years of professional experience, his background is entirely in software development (web, backend, infrastructure) with no experience in the core required domains: SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, hardware-software co-design, or deep-learning workload optimization. The role requires specialized hardware architecture expertise that is fundamentally different from his software engineering focus.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with proven ability to build complex systems and infrastructure
Low-level language experience (C, C++, DLang) and infrastructure/DevOps background demonstrates systems-level thinking
Current role in AI-agent infrastructure shows some exposure to AI/ML domain, though at software level rather than hardware optimization
concerns: No experience with SoC design, IP modeling, or hardware architecture—the core technical requirements of the role
Completely lacks expertise in GPU architecture, deep-learning workload analysis, and hardware performance optimization
Background is entirely software-focused; no evidence of hardware-software co-design or hardware optimization experience required for this principal-level hardware architecture role
